attacking_style: Attempts ambitious solo moves on climbs but lacks sustained power to maintain separation, requiring bridge-backs when efforts fail.
team_tactics: Cannondale deploys designated domestiques (Clarke) to front for tempo setting and GC protection, showing traditional stage race support structure.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages where tactical ambition can be displayed, though power-to-weight may limit effectiveness on steepest gradients.
vulnerability: Insufficient power output to sustain solo attacks once launched; efforts are neutralized requiring return to main group.
key_patterns: Launches ambitious attacks without power to finish them solo, necessitating bridge-backs.
Team commits domestique resources to front-running for GC protection and positioning.
Shows tactical aggression but physical execution falls short of breaking elite climbers.
form_trajectory: neutral: Single race shows willingness to attack but inability to convert efforts into results
